title: EU Password Security Policy
audience: All EU employees and long-term contractors
short_description: EU password policy document with 12-character minimum and 90-day rotation requirements.

title: EU Password and Authentication Policy (Active)
audience: All EU employees and long-term contractors
short_description: Current and authoritative EU password policy with 14-character minimum, passphrase guidance, and mandatory MFA for remote access.

title: EU Employee Onboarding Checklist
audience: Hiring managers, HR partners, and new EU employees
short_description: EU onboarding workflow covering GDPR training, payroll setup, device provisioning, and account/password activation steps.

title: US Employee Onboarding Checklist
audience: Hiring managers, HR partners, and new US employees
short_description: US onboarding workflow for tax and benefits setup, payroll activation, device access, and initial password/account tasks.

title: EU VPN Access Procedure
audience: EU employees, contractors, and support teams
short_description: Procedure for EU VPN request, setup, and secure usage; references active EU password policy and mandatory MFA.

title: EU Password Reset FAQ
short_description: Operational FAQ for EU password reset and lockout handling; points users to the active IAM policy for authoritative rules.
